text: A sword that can cut anything is not a sword. A sword that can cut nothing can cut anything.
author: Koushirou

text: Fools who don't respect the past are likely to repeat it.
author: Nico Robin

text: If you don't take risks, you can't create a future.
author: Monkey D. Luffy

text: There comes a time when a man has to stand and fight! That time is when his friends' dreams are being laughed at!
author: Usopp

text: Only those who have suffered long, can see the light within the shadows.
author: Roronoa Zoro

text: People's dreams... have no end!
author: Marshall D. Teach

text: If you don't like your destiny, don't accept it. Instead, have the courage to change it the way you want it to be.
author: Naruto Uzumaki

text: Hard work is worthless for those that don't believe in themselves.
author: Might Guy

text: A smile is the best way to get yourself out of a tight spot, even if it is a fake one.
author: Sai

text: It is not the face that makes someone a monster, it's the choices they make with their lives.
author: Naruto Uzumaki

text: To know what is right and choose to ignore it is the act of a coward.
author: Kakashi Hatake

text: Growth occurs when one goes beyond one's limits.
author: Itachi Uchiha

text: Even if you're not the chosen one, even if you're not great, you can still become the greatest.
author: Asta

text: My magic is never giving up!
author: Asta

text: As long as you don't give up, you can do anything.
author: Yami Sukehiro

text: Surpass your limits. Right here, right now.
author: Yami Sukehiro

text: If you want to protect something, do it properly! Don't let anything break you!
author: Noelle Silva

text: The weak make excuses. The strong make progress.
author: Sung Jinwoo

text: A system that rewards effort is the only system worth serving.
author: Sung Jinwoo

text: The system uses me, and I use the system.
author: Sung Jinwoo

text: I shall protect my family, even if it means fighting the entire world.
author: Sung Jinwoo

text: If you stare into the abyss, the abyss stares back at you.
author: Sung Jinwoo

text: May the Force be with you.
author: General Dodonna

text: Do, or do not. There is no try.
author: Yoda

text: It’s not who I am underneath, but what I do that defines me.
author: Batman

text: Why do we fall? So we can learn to pick ourselves up.
author: Thomas Wayne

text: Great men are not born great, they grow great.
author: Mario Puzo

text: I'm going to make him an offer he can't refuse.
author: Vito Corleone

text: The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn't exist.
author: Verbal Kint

text: Carpe diem. Seize the day, boys. Make your lives extraordinary.
author: John Keating

text: Get busy living, or get busy dying.
author: Andy Dufresne

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
author: Alan Kay

text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Pain is inevitable. Suffering is optional.
author: Haruki Murakami
